meta.title: Playtime Manager — Gaming lounge management, offline
meta.description: Track device time, add snack orders, and see today's revenue — one app for gaming lounges

hero.badge: Built for gaming lounges in Syria
hero.title: Run your gaming lounge without a notebook or internet
hero.subtitle: Track PlayStation, PC, and billiards time, add snack orders, and see today's revenue in one simple app.
hero.trustLine: Works 100% offline — support and activation via WhatsApp
hero.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like details about activating Playtime for my gaming lounge.

stats.offlineSub: Keep working when the network is down
stats.snacksSub: Add orders to the same session
stats.reportsSub: Know today's revenue without manual totals

problem.title: Pen and paper cost you time and money
problem.subtitle: In the lounge, small mistakes repeat every day: unbilled time, forgotten orders, or unclear revenue at closing.

items.title: Inaccurate session time
items.desc: Manual start and end times are easy to get wrong during busy hours.

items.title: Forgotten snack orders
items.desc: Staff sell drinks or chips but forget to log them on the customer or device.

items.title: Unclear daily revenue
items.desc: At night you tally the notebook and still wonder if the number is right.

items.title: Hard to track details
items.desc: Who started the session? How long? What was added? It should all be clear.

features.title: Your lounge's daily work in one app
features.subtitle: Start a session, add an order, close the bill, review today's report — no paper, no internet.

items.title: Device management
items.desc: See which devices are busy or free, and time and amount per device.

items.title: Open & fixed sessions
items.desc: Start an open session or set time upfront — however your lounge works.

items.title: Snacks & orders
items.desc: Add drinks and snacks to the same session instead of a separate tally.

items.title: Revenue reports
items.desc: See today's revenue from play and orders without manual adding.

items.title: Works offline
items.desc: Core operations keep running even when the network is down.

items.title: Easy Arabic UI
items.desc: Built for owners or staff without complicated training.

preview.title: All your lounge devices on one screen
preview.subtitle: See busy devices, current time, amount, and orders linked to each session.
preview.imageAlt: Playtime app on mobile — devices and sessions dashboard

howItWorks.title: Get started in three quick steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex setup. We contact you and help activate the app for your lounge.

steps.title: Contact us on WhatsApp
steps.desc: We explain the app and help you pick the right plan for your lounge.

steps.title: Install and activate your device
steps.desc: We give you an activation code for your device so you can start.

steps.title: Add devices, prices, and go
steps.desc: Set up devices, play rates, products, and start logging sessions.

reports.title: Know your lounge revenue without tallying a notebook at night
reports.subtitle: Playtime gives you a clear summary of play revenue, snack orders, and session counts by day or month.
reports.placeholderNote: Reports screenshot — replace when you have an app image

security.title: Your lounge data stays under your control
security.subtitle: The offline version runs on your device; core data stays stored locally without needing the internet.

items.title: Activation per device
items.desc: Each license is activated on a specific device to protect your subscription.

items.title: Owner PIN
items.desc: Protect settings or sensitive reports with an owner PIN, when the feature is enabled.

items.title: Local data
items.desc: In the offline version, core operations stay saved on your device.

items.title: Online version coming
items.desc: Sync and cloud backup will be part of the upcoming online version.

platforms.title: Run Playtime on the device that fits your lounge
platforms.subtitle: Use it on your cashier phone or management device — however you work.
platforms.currentDesc: Run Playtime on an Android phone or tablet in your lounge and manage sessions and orders offline.
platforms.comingNote: Windows and desktop versions are under study or development for later.

faq.title: Questions lounge owners ask before subscribing

items.a: Yes. The current version runs offline for core operations: sessions, orders, and local reports.

items.q: Do I need a computer or is a phone enough?
items.a: Currently the app is available on Android phones or tablets in the lounge. Other versions are under study.
You get a code for your device and send it to us on WhatsApp; we send you the activation code.

items.q: What if I change my device?
items.a: Contact us on WhatsApp to review activation and help according to our transfer policy.

items.q: Does it support snacks and drinks?
items.a: Yes. You can add orders to a session so the final bill is clearer.
Yes. Support and activation are via WhatsApp during the hours shown on this site.
The current version is offline. We're working on an online version with sync, multiple staff, and backup when changing devices.
Prices may be shown in dollars; payment in Syrian pounds is available at the exchange rate when you subscribe.
Sham Cash, Syriatel Cash, Al-Haram, Al-Fouad, Shakhshiro, or cash in Damascus. We confirm the method and transfer details after you contact us.

items.q: Can I pay in Syrian pounds?
items.a: Yes. An approximate amount is shown at the current exchange rate; the final amount may differ at payment time.

items.q: Why are prices shown in US dollars?
items.a: Subscriptions are priced in USD to keep plans stable; you can view approximate values in Syrian pounds in the pricing section.

paymentMethods.title: Payment options in Syria
paymentMethods.description: After you choose a plan, pay using the method that suits you. We send payment and activation details when you contact us.
paymentMethods.note: Payment details depend on the plan and transfer method and are confirmed before you subscribe.
paymentMethods.cta: Choose a plan, then contact us to confirm payment
paymentMethods.ctaPrefill: Hello, I chose a plan and want to confirm payment and activation.

comparison.title: Why Playtime beats pen & paper and Excel?
comparison.subtitle: A gaming lounge needs fast time, orders, and reports — not a forgettable notebook or manual spreadsheet.

rows.feature: Good for staff on holidays and busy days

pricing.title: Choose the subscription term that fits your lounge
pricing.subtitle: All plans include sessions, devices, orders, reports, and offline use on Android.
pricing.paymentNote: Base prices are in USD. Payment in Syrian pounds is available at the exchange rate when you subscribe.
pricing.trustNote: Not sure which plan fits? Contact us before paying.
pricing.planContactPrefill: Hello, I would like to subscribe to the {plan} plan for my gaming lounge.

currency.disclaimer: SYP prices are approximate and may change at payment depending on the rate when you transfer.
currency.error: Could not load the exchange rate. Contact us for the price in Syrian pounds.

plans.title: Monthly
plans.description: Good for trying the app or starting without a long commitment.

plans.title: 6 Months
plans.description: A solid choice for most lounges that want stable use at a better price.

plans.title: Annual
plans.description: Best if you want to run the app all year at the lowest monthly cost.

cta.title: Ditch the notebook — track your lounge accurately
cta.subtitle: Contact us now to activate Playtime and manage sessions, orders, and reports offline.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like details about activating Playtime for my gaming lounge.
cta.note: Support and activation via WhatsApp — payment in Syrian pounds available

useCases.title: Fits your lounge whatever you run
useCases.subtitle: PlayStation, PCs, billiards, ping pong, or snacks — Playtime helps you organize billing in one place.

items.title: PlayStation lounges
items.desc: Track each device and bill sessions automatically at your rates.

items.title: PC gaming
items.desc: Manage PCs, time, and orders per player or device.

items.title: Billiards & ping pong
items.desc: Bill by the hour or open session — however your lounge works.

items.title: Snacks & drinks
items.desc: Add items to the same session for a clearer final bill.

beforeAfter.title: The difference shows from day one
beforeAfter.subtitle: Instead of memory and a notebook, keep every session and order in the app.
before: Hard to know revenue per device.
after: Every session logged in the app.
Orders added to the same session.
Owner PIN for settings when enabled.

roiCalculator.title: How much might you lose with manual billing?
roiCalculator.subtitle: Try rough numbers to estimate waste from forgotten time or orders. Results are estimates, not guarantees.
roiCalculator.disclaimer: These figures are estimates and vary by lounge size and workflow.

support.title: Contact us for a quick app walkthrough
support.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp — we'll answer questions and help activate Playtime on your device.
support.responseTime: Typical reply within 1 hour during business hours
support.whatsappTitle: WhatsApp — fastest way to reach us
support.whatsappDesc: Send a photo or question about your lounge and we'll suggest how to set up.
support.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like details about activating Playtime for my gaming lounge.
support.stepsTitle: What happens after you contact us?
steps: We answer your questions and suggest the right plan
We send your activation code after subscription
We help with setup if you need it

contactChat.privacyNote: By sending a message, you agree we use your number only to reply to your request.
contactChat.headerStatus: Send your message and we will reply soon
contactChat.welcomeLine2: Enter your number and message. We will reply soon about Playtime activation or any question about the app.
contactChat.autoReply: Your message reached us on WhatsApp. Thank you — we will reply soon.
contactChat.autoReplyFirst: Your message was sent to our WhatsApp support ✅
contactChat.autoReplyFirstSub: We will review your request and reply to the number you provided soon.
contactChat.autoReplyWhatsAppOffline: Automatic WhatsApp delivery is temporarily unavailable. Use the button below to send via WhatsApp directly.
contactChat.errorPhone: Enter a valid contact number so we can reach you.
contactChat.errorNetwork: Could not send the message. Check your connection and try again.
